title: GitLab Inc. (GTLB) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: GitLab reported quarterly earnings of $0.30 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $0.23 per share, representing an earnings surprise of 32.57% compared to analyst expectations. The company generated $260.4 million in quarterly revenues for the period ending January 2026, surpassing consensus projections by 3.50%. These results compare to $0.33 per share and $211.43 million in revenues from the same quarter one year prior. Over the last four quarters, the company has surpassed consensus EPS estimates four times and similarly exceeded revenue expectations in the same period. Despite strong earnings, GitLab shares have underperformed significantly, declining approximately 30.2% year-to-date.
